_comment: Content blueprint for the LISRAYA email

content_blueprint.headline: Personalized support for treatment with LISRAYA® (brepocitinib)
content_blueprint.copy_outline: My Compass Support is here to help you navigate treatment, from cost and authorization assistance to pharmacy coordination and beyond.
content_blueprint.design_concept: Warm welcome handshake — 'My Compass Support' introduced as a human, care-team moment, not a corporate program splash. Surface is solid White #ffffff so this section opens the email clean; headline sits in Nunito Sans Bold, Title Case, Brand Blue #00529b at H1 display scale, underlined by a single thin 2px Gold #ffc60a hairline rule that runs about 60% of the headline width — the brand's signature gold underscore that recurs below every section heading. Layout is an image/text split ~40/60: the patient-and-doctor photo anchors the left 40% column, cropped into the brand Accent shape (large 120px radius on top-left + bottom-right, 6px on the opposite corners) so the warm clinic moment reads modern and optimistic rather than rectangular stock; the supportive hand-on-shoulder gesture in the photo points the eye rightward into the copy. Body runs in Nunito Sans Regular, Graphite #212121, 16px/24px, with 'My Compass Support' bolded Brand Blue on its first instance only as the focal phrase; establish 'dermatomyositis (DM)' nowhere needed here since copy is support-framed. The small white hand-holding-heart line icon (Brand Blue stroke) sits as a compact ~40px badge directly preceding the headline like a program mark, single-color and minimal per iconography rules. Airy and reassuring — generous 32px top/bottom padding, one focal photo, calm pacing that sets up the brisker functional sections below.

visuals.name: patient and dr.jpeg
visuals.description: [PHOTO] A mid-shot of an older Asian woman patient with short, curly gray hair, wearing a light gray knit sweater, seated in a softly lit room. She looks up with a warm, appreciative expression at a younger female healthcare provider standi

content_blueprint.clinical_fact_covered: My Compass Support helps with cost, authorization, and pharmacy.

content_blueprint.copy_outline:
You may be eligible to pay as little as $0* per month for ISRAYA

*My Compass Support Copay Program is available to eligible private or employer-insured patients only, and is subject to terms and conditions found at [url with anchor link to T&C]
content_blueprint.design_concept: The $0 affordability beat — the single loudest, most generous moment in the email, built as a Light Blue data callout rather than a white card. Section background is Light Blue #E6F0F9 (the 70% tint surface) edge-to-edge at 600px so it visually separates from the White intro above; the savings claim lives in a White #ffffff Accent-shape panel (120px radius top-left + bottom-right, 6px opposite) floating on that light-blue field with comfortable 24px insets. The '$0' is the hero: Nunito Sans ExtraBold, Brand Blue #00529b, set oversized as the dominant focal beat, with 'as little as' and 'per month' in smaller Nunito Sans SemiBold Brand Blue tucked tight around it so the eye lands on the zero first. The white checklist-document line icon (Brand Blue stroke) rides as an ~80px White rounded Accent-shape badge straddling the panel's left edge (mirrored 20px/4px radii, subtle Dark Navy #011E45 drop shadow at low opacity) — the brand's half-on/half-off icon-callout device, signaling 'paperwork handled.' The asterisked eligibility qualifier sits clearly separated beneath at 12px/18px Graphite #212121, noticeably smaller per fine-print rules, with the T&C as a Brand Blue underlined link. Dense and confident where its neighbors are airy — one number, one icon, zero competing focal points.

content_blueprint.clinical_fact_covered: Eligible patients may pay as little as $0 per month.

content_blueprint.headline: Enrolling Is Simple
content_blueprint.copy_outline:
Text [Keyword] to [SMS Number], or enroll online at www.LISRAYA.com.

After you consent and enroll, your PAL will give you a welcome call and follow up by text to get you started.
content_blueprint.design_concept: Two-step on-ramp — 'Enrolling Is Simple' rendered as a calm, scannable path, the email's most utilitarian section. Background switches to Golden Sand #FEF1C8 at its 30% tint so it reads warm and distinct from the Light Blue copay band above (alternating-block delineation per layout rules). Heading in Nunito Sans Bold, Title Case, Brand Blue #00529b at H2 scale with the recurring 2px Gold #ffc60a hairline beneath it for system continuity. Body steps stack vertically in Nunito Sans Regular Graphite #212121 16px/24px: step one (text a keyword / enroll online) and step two (PAL welcome call + text follow-up), with the action verbs and 'PAL' carried in Bold Brand Blue as the one key phrase per step — never two same-size blocks signaling different hierarchy. The two-tone document-with-pen line icon (Brand Blue) anchors the section as a single ~48px mark beside the heading, reinforcing 'sign and go' without a repeated icon-tile grid. Layout stays single-column, left-aligned, with hairline 1px Sky Blue #358CCB dividers separating the two steps so the sequence reads as numbered progression. Tighter rhythm than the intro, lighter than copay — quick, legible, functional, generous 32px padding top/bottom keeping it uncluttered.

icons.name: Icon_document_pen.png
icons.description: [ICON] A two-tone blue and white line-art icon depicting a sheet of paper with a folded top-right corner and three horizontal lines indicating text. A ballpoint pen is overlaid diagonally across the lower right of the sheet, with a blue cap

content_blueprint.clinical_fact_covered: Enroll via text or online; PAL follows up after enrollment.

content_blueprint.design_concept: The closing drive-to-enroll — the mandated Gradient Callout CTA banner, full-width and warm to end on the brand's optimistic Sunshine note after three cooler sections. Background is the approved Gradient_callout.png (bright Sunshine #faa31b → deep orange) sized cover, no-repeat, centered, with a hard Sunshine #faa31b solid fallback behind it for Outlook. Headline 'Enroll at LISRAYA.com' equivalent sits centered in the top third, Brand Blue #00529b, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line — Brand Blue on warm gold for the on-brand high-contrast lockup. The single button is centered in the lower-middle: Deep Blue #003D74 fill, White #ffffff label in Nunito Sans 800 18px, followed by two non-breaking spaces and a Gold #FFC20E arrow chevron at 24px, sized 248×64px with the mandatory signature asymmetric radius 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px exactly — never simplified. No icon, no photo, no secondary CTA: one headline, one button, one warm field. Airy and singular by design — the visual exhale and final instruction that the whole email funnels toward.

visuals.name: Gradient_callout.png
visuals.description: [OTHER] Solid horizontal gradient background transitioning from bright yellow on the left to deep orange on the right with a smooth color blend. No additional visual elements or text present.

content_blueprint.clinical_fact_covered: Directs reader to enroll at LISRAYA.com.
